name: any2ppt
description: A practical production workflow for turning text, PDF, or URL source material into presentation-ready deck briefs, storyboards, and per-slide visual direction. Mode-aware (image-first / pptx-native / hybrid) with rule-based quality review.

interface.shortDescription: Turn text, PDF, or URL source material into presentation-ready deck plans.
interface.longDescription: Any2PPT coordinates a budget-aware deck production workflow: ingest text / PDF / URL, shape the argument, plan slide storyboards, direct visuals, and run a rule-based review before delivery. Five specialist skills: deck-producer, document-ingestor, story-architect, slide-storyboarder, visual-director. Three production modes: image-first, pptx-native (experimental), hybrid.
defaultPrompt: Turn this transcript into a deck storyboard.
Create slide prompts from this outline.
Ingest this PDF (or URL) and start a deck.
Review this deck plan for weak slides.
